CustomField.formula: CASE( RecordType.DeveloperName , 'Total', CompleteRate__c * CommissionDetail__r.CommissionConfiguration__r.TotalF__c, 'TV', CompleteRate__c * CommissionDetail__r.CommissionConfiguration__r.TVF__c, 'HA', CompleteRate__c * CommissionDetail__r.CommissionConfiguration__r.HAF__c, 'HighEnd', CompleteRate__c * CommissionDetail__r.CommissionConfiguration__r.HighEndF__c, 'Elements7', CompleteRate__c * CommissionDetail__r.CommissionConfiguration__r.Elements7F__c, 'Reporting', CompleteRate__c * CommissionDetail__r.CommissionConfiguration__r.ReportingF__c, 0 )
CustomField.label: Module Complete Rate F
